'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 7''' is the seventh issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 7 was published in Spring [[1989]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Harrison Ford: The Man with the Hat" by [[Dan Madsen]] and [[John S. Davis]]
*"Collections: The Licensing of Lucasfilm" by [[Adam Schultz]]
*"Rob MacGregor: Chronicling ''The Last Crusade''" by John S. Davis
*"Inside ILM: ''Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade''"
*"Indiana Jones and the Junior Novelization" by John S. Davis
*"Own C-3PO's Hand!"
*"What's Cooking in Nockmaar?" by [[Lisa E. Cowan]] and [[R. Tomasic]]
